## Review: ddx-bfff4bc7 iter 1

### Verdict: APPROVE

### AC Grades

| # | Item | Grade | Evidence |
|---|------|-------|----------|
| 1 | No (*Runner). methods in compare_adapter.go | APPROVE | cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go — All four `(r *Runner)` receiver methods removed: `cleanupCompareWorktrees` (old L361-364), `RunCompare` (old L168-172), `RunQuorum` (old L422-426), `RunBenchmark` (old L649-653) |
| 2 | Free functions or service-method wrappers replace them | APPROVE | cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go — Added `RunCompareWithAgent` (L168-174), `RunQuorumWithAgent` (L422-427), `RunBenchmarkWithAgent` (L649-654) as free functions taking `agentlib.DdxAgent`; ViaService variants already existed |
| 3 | Tests pass | APPROVE | `go test ./cmd` → PASS (25.174s) |

### Summary

All three acceptance criteria are fully satisfied. The migration replaced four `(r *Runner)` method shims with three new free functions (`RunCompareWithAgent`, `RunQuorumWithAgent`, `RunBenchmarkWithAgent`) taking `agentlib.DdxAgent`, plus a new `RunViaServiceWith` helper. Tests pass cleanly.
